evals.name: flowchart-with-decisions
evals.prompt: Create a mermaid flowchart for a user login flow: start -> enter credentials -> validate -> if valid go to dashboard, if invalid show error and retry (max 3 times), if locked out show account locked page
evals.expected_output: A .mmd file containing a flowchart with decision diamonds, retry loop, and at least 6 nodes

evals.name: sequence-diagram-api-flow
evals.prompt: Draw a mermaid sequence diagram showing: mobile app sends POST /login to API gateway, gateway forwards to auth service, auth service queries user DB, returns JWT, gateway returns token to mobile app. Include activation bars.
evals.expected_output: A .mmd file containing a sequenceDiagram with 4 participants and activation

evals.name: er-diagram-with-relationships
evals.prompt: Create a mermaid ER diagram for a blog platform: Users have many Posts, Posts have many Comments, Users have many Comments, Posts have many Tags (many-to-many via PostTag). Include key fields for each entity.
evals.expected_output: A .mmd file containing an erDiagram with 5 entities and proper cardinality

assertions.text: Has at least 4 entity definitions with fields

evals.name: architecture-with-subgraphs
evals.prompt: Diagram our architecture: Frontend (React web + React Native mobile) -> API Gateway (Kong) -> Backend Services (Auth, Users, Orders) -> Data Layer (PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ). Group by layer using subgraphs.
evals.expected_output: A .mmd file containing a flowchart with at least 3 subgraphs

evals.name: validation-error-recovery
evals.prompt: Create a mermaid flowchart that includes the word 'end' as a node label and uses special characters in labels like parentheses and quotes. Make sure it validates correctly.
evals.expected_output: A .mmd file that properly escapes reserved words and special characters

assertions.text: Special characters are escaped or quoted
Passes mmdc validation despite tricky content
